prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约7102→8814→9599，连续三年后移，累计后移约2497名，年均后移约1249名，后移趋势明显加速；2025年基准位次约9599名；本省理科计划2023年216人、2024年217人、2025年208人，2026年计划214人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.9%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在84–92名区间，2026年排名第89名，学校层次和综合实力保持稳定；长安大学在声誉评价文件中未出现，声 誉信号中性；抖音学校热度总排名第83位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估中交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通运输、交通工程等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024–2026年均处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别），与长安大学优势工科方向吻合，可能推高相 关专业竞争；本省2025年理科考生52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（不确定），按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约163000人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争显著加剧 新疆理科本科一批2025年421分较2024年390分上升31分，反映整体竞争水平提升；长安大学位于陕西西安，与新疆同属西北地区，地理距离较近 ，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生规模约200人以上，属于该校在西北地区的重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年本省理科 考生大幅增加、以及2026年计划仅小幅扩招2.9%的有限缓解作用；预测2026年理科最低位次约9800名， 区间9300–10300名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 7102 → 8814 → 9599, shifting backward for three consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 2497 places and an average annual shift of about 1249 places, showing an accelerating trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9599; the provincial science enrollment plan was 216 in 2023, 217 in 2024, 208 in 2025, and 214 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.9% compared to 2025, with limited impact on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 84–92 range in recent years, ranking 89th in 2026, with stable school level and comprehensive strength; Chang'an University did not appear in reputation evaluation documents, with a neutral reputation signal; Douyin school popularity total ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant signs of increased application interest; no record of admission gaps or anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A-class discipline of the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Transportation, and Traffic Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have consistently high social popularity (rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' from 2024 to 2026), aligning with Chang'an University's advantageous engineering fields, potentially increasing competition for related majors; the provincial science examinees in 2025 were 52,538, and the total examinees in 2026 were about 238,000 (uncertain), with an estimated science examinee count of about 163,000 based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, a significant increase from 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the Xinjiang science first batch undergraduate score in 2025 was 421 points, up 31 points from 390 in 2024, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, geographically close to Xinjiang in the northwest region, offering some regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees; the university's science enrollment in Xinjiang is over 200, making it an important source province in the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in provincial science examinees in 2026, and the limited easing effect of a mere 2.9% enrollment expansion in 2026; the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 9800, with a range of 9300–10300.

- Computer Science and Technology

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Material Forming and Control Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices, etc.)
- Geology (Geology, Resource Exploration Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering, Carbon Storage Science and Engineering)
- Geological Engineering
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Geospatial Information Engineering)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9300–10300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, etc., which are supported by A- disciplines and offer high cost-effectiveness), with Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<9300), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>10300), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Chang'an University has traditional strengths in transportation, civil engineering, and geology, and the A- discipline Transportation Engineering corresponds to majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering and Transportation, which have outstanding disciplinary strength and deserve special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1290 → 1499 → 1765, shifting backward for three consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 475 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1765; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 5 in 2026, a significant reduction of 50% compared to 2025. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will lead to a decrease in ranking numbers (easing competition), but the liberal arts enrollment base is extremely small (only 5 people), causing large fluctuations in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the main ranking of Soft Science has been stable in the range of 84–92 in recent years, with a stable school level; Chang'an University's reputation signal is neutral; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal admission records; the liberal arts majors offered by Chang'an University (Journalism and Communication, Administrative Management, Architecture) do not have corresponding A-level discipline support, and the overall strength of liberal arts disciplines is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged' (consistently cold since 2023), Administrative Management corresponds to the public management category with stable popularity, and Architecture corresponds to architecture with divided and wait-and-see popularity; in 2025, the province had 24,010 liberal arts candidates, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (uncertain). Based on the recent liberal arts proportion of about 31.4%, the estimated number of liberal arts candidates in 2026 is about 74,600, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition. The first batch of liberal arts undergraduate in Xinjiang in 2025 had a score of 451, up 26 points from 425 in 2024, indicating an increase in competition level; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which has a certain regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the number of liberal arts admissions is extremely small (5 people), and rankings are greatly affected by individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant increase in liberal arts candidates in 2026 and the offsetting effect of a 50% reduction in enrollment plan; the liberal arts enrollment base is extremely small (5 people), leading to high ranking volatility; taking into account the surge in candidate numbers, a slight upward adjustment is made; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 1266, with a range of 1038–1494.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Liberal arts enrollment is only 5 people, with large ranking fluctuations. If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1038–1494, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Administrative Management as the main direction, use Tier 1 Journalism and Communication as a sprint (note that this major has low social popularity), and Tier 3 Architecture as a safety option. Due to the extremely small number of admissions, the application risk is high, so it is advisable to prepare alternative university options.
